programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Nine-time PGA Tour winner Stuart Appleby teaches his trade secrets on all aspects of the full swing, from dialing in wedges to a secret move to get extra yards off the tee. Appleby also displays the keys to proper setup and posture.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Nine-time PGA Tour winner Stuart Appleby dedicates an entire episode to cover all aspects of bunker play. He instructs how to get out of the sand with precision from side hill, downhill, uphill, plugged, and routine lies.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Key parts of the swing golfers should copy from the best players in the world; a backswing move used by Sam Burns; a drill to add distance like Xander Schauffele; a footwork tip that helped Scottie Scheffler.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: How to increase club head speed, ball speed, and other key areas where speed is needed for more distance. Martin Hall brings in one of the worldwide leaders in golf biomechanics for a cutting-edge lesson on practicing at the correct speed.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal take the fear out of golf's scariest shots. Learn drills to avoid the dreaded shank, tips on how to hit the ball out of a divot, and advice from Butch Harmon on escaping tree trouble.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach what to take away from the best players and shots in golf this year. How to play approach shots from deep rough, side hill lies, and fairway bunkers. Martin also reveals the book that every golfer should be reading.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick talks about the underlying principle of distance -- clubhead speed -- and the keys to gaining more distance with the driver. McCormick also explains and demonstrates range of motion and speed development.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year and coach to three-time major champion Jordan Spieth, unlocks the secrets to building a championship-caliber golf game.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick brings you inside his lab to scientifically prove how ground forces affect the golf swing. McCormick explains how to achieve maximum power with the lead leg and how to move properly through the swing with the trail leg.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: The most common problem for amateur golfers is the slice. Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, tackles this issue by explaining how club delivery with the face and path dictates curve.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.sub-title: The Playbook - Snake in the Grass
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick moves to the putting green to teach the best strategies to making more putts and conquering the dreaded yips. McCormick explains the importance of the start line and how to gain control of the putter face for optimal control.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.sub-title: The Playbook - Foundation and Coordination for Juniors
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, unlocks the secrets to building a championship-caliber golf game.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick teaches the what and how behind the score-saving shots that amaze people who watch professional golf. Specialty shots take center stage as viewers learn how to execute the "Skid Spinner," "Super Flop," and the "Banker."

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick demonstrates how to execute difficult fairway bunker shots, dreaded mid-range bunker shots, and buried bunker lies.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Learn how to drive the ball farther of the tee with help from David Duval.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: David Duval shares tips to help players control distance with their irons, how to grip club, and gain more consistency through entire bag.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: David Duval and Charlie Rymer share tips and drills that cover all aspects of golf.

programme.title: Martin Chuck: Breaking 90
programme.desc: Martin Chuck teaches how to correct the driver and iron swing mistakes keeping players from breaking 90.

programme.title: Martin Chuck: Breaking 90
programme.desc: Martin Chuck shares his five keys to putting and teaches short game tips to help players break 90.

programme.title: Martin Hall: Breaking 80
programme.desc: Martin Hall gives lessons to crush the driver, stick the approach and more keys for breaking 80.

programme.title: Martin Hall: Breaking 80
programme.desc: Martin Hall shares his short game rules and teaches the putting tips needed to break 80.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Learn how to drive the ball farther of the tee with help from David Duval.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach great drills that require a partner. Martin also teaches teamwork tips for driving it longer, sticking your approach shots, hitting solid pitch shots, and making more putts.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to putt like the U.S. Open champion. Learn drills to improve your grip, aim, path and keys to sinking more putts. Martin also discusses what you can learn from Ben Hogan's legendary ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal join PGA TOUR stars on the range at the Rocket Mortgage Classic to teach how to hit it like the pros. Martin shares inside the ropes secrets to help crush the driver, make solid contact with irons, and spin wedges.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: School of Golf celebrates its 300th episode milestone by reliving the lessons that Arnold Palmer, Tom Watson, and more Hall of Famers taught over the show's nine seasons.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Learn how Raymond Floyd squared the putter face and how Ben Crenshaw achieved great tempo. Also, the two things all great putters have in common and how a simple grip change can cure the yips.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: A look at some skills from the players, shots and courses in the FedExCup Playoffs, including tips from Tiger Woods and Bryson Dechambeau.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal use images of planes, trains, and automobiles to show the swing adjustments needed to maximize performance with every club. Learn what makes hitting a driver different than hitting an iron and how to sink more putts.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Key movements from the sport of football that can help build a better golf swing; a look an issue that limits distance.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: What the amateur golfer can learn from the longest drivers in the world; an in-studio visit from Phillis Meti.
